design_philosophy.name: Neo-Brutalist Gamified Pop
design_philosophy.description: High energy, tactile, and 'juicy'. A rejection of sterile corporate SaaS. We use thick borders, hard shadows, vibrant colors, and exaggerated spacing to create a fun, arcade-like experience.
core_principles: No blur shadows. Hard shadows only (e.g., box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #000).
High saturation colors. No muted pastels.
Juicy interactions: Buttons must physically move on click.

buttons.primary: bg-violet-500 text-white font-black text-lg px-8 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-none transition-all active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-950 font-bold text-lg px-8 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] hover:bg-zinc-50 hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-950 font-bold hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border-2 border-zinc-950 rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] p-6 relative overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white border-2 border-zinc-950 rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] p-6 cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border-2 border-zinc-950 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-lg ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-violet-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 font-medium

progress.container: h-6 w-full bg-zinc-100 border-2 border-zinc-950 rounded-full overflow-hidden
progress.bar: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-fuchsia-500 border-r-2 border-zinc-950 transition-all duration-500 ease-out

instructions_to_main_agent: NEVER use default soft shadows. ALWAYS use the custom hard shadow utility `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)]`.
Borders are mandatory. Every card, button, and input must have a `border-2 border-zinc-950`.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections: Mascot for welcome/level-up, Grid pattern for quiz background.
Use `framer-motion` for page transitions (slide up/down) and element entry (staggered fade-up).
When a user completes a quiz or levels up, trigger `canvas-confetti`.
Quiz Layout: Use a centralized card layout with massive typography for the question.
Timers: Make them visual (circular progress or reducing bar) and urgent (color shift from green to red).
Accessibility: Ensure high contrast. The black text on white/yellow/violet is safe, but check smaller text.
Mobile Responsive: Buttons must be full-width on mobile (`w-full`). Touch targets must be at least 44px.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interactive_elements: Must provide visual feedback on press (scale down or remove shadow).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.empty_states: Use the mascot images for empty states with encouraging text.
